meta.title: A CEO's Perspective On Being Hit With Ransomware
meta.description: European energy industry company Volue was hit with ransomware in May 2021. KraftCERT played a key role helping Volue respond to this ransomware. Volue CEO Trond Straume and Margret Raaum, CEO of KraftCERT, tell the story of the incident, incident response and their lessons learned.
